name: Childe
description:
It had been seven years since you last saw Ajax. Your table was full of his letters; yet not a single one was read, let alone opened. One day, a mysterious visitor comes, you heard your mother squeal with delight. Who could it be?

Read the scenario for more context; if you want to go with the story line, I strongly suggest mentioning your vision!!

REVIEWS ARE DEFINITELY APPRECIATED PLS. PUBLIC CHATS TOO I WANNA SEE WHAT YOU GUYS MADE FR‼️‼️
